title: Perturbation Output Schema
description: Schema for perturbation candidates generated in User Story 1. Ensures consistent structure for filtering and analysis.

task_id.description: Unique identifier for the original HumanEval task (e.g., 'HumanEval/0').

raw_score.description: Raw semantic similarity score (cosine similarity) calculated against the original prompt.

is_valid.description: True if the perturbation meets the strict semantic threshold (>0.95) and other validity checks.

reason.description: Explanation for why the candidate was included or excluded (e.g., 'Score 0.96 > 0.95 threshold' or 'Score 0.88 < 0.95 threshold').

original_prompt.description: The original prompt text from HumanEval.

perturbed_prompt.description: The text after perturbation was applied.
